overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic covered waterfront promenade with orange arched canopies. The player character walks past various NPCs and kiosks before sitting on a concrete bench to observe the surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade with orange canopy

events.description: passing by a teal information kiosk on the right side
approaching the concrete bench seating area with seated NPCs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered promenade toward a seating area with concrete benches

notable_agents.action: man in dark jacket walking away from camera toward the bench area

entered.detail: futuristic orange metal and glass canopy structure overhead casting grid shadows
modern glass facade building with reflections on the left side
small teal and yellow information booth with digital displays
futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance beyond the promenade

segments.scene_description: The camera walks forward through a covered waterfront promenade characterized by an orange arched canopy overhead. The path is lined with modern glass buildings on the left and various kiosks on the right. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions as the camera approaches a seating area with concrete benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: promenade seating area with concrete benches

events.description: camera sits down on concrete bench next to two seated NPCs
woman in green jacket who was sitting next to ego stands up and walks away
camera pans left to reveal amusement park structure and more of the waterfront

agents.ego_description: sitting on a concrete bench observing pedestrians walking through the promenade and taking photos with a phone

notable_agents.action: woman in green jacket sitting on bench then standing up and walking away
man with green hair and tattoos walking past the bench

entered.detail: long concrete seating bench where ego is now seated
vertical digital advertisement screen displaying media content
ferris wheel and roller coaster visible in the distant background

segments.scene_description: The camera sits down on a concrete bench in the covered promenade, joining two NPCs who are resting. The woman in the green jacket soon stands up and leaves while the camera remains seated, panning to observe various pedestrians walking past including a man with distinctive green hair. The scene reveals an amusement park structure in the distant background as the camera looks around.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a futuristic waterfront promenade that transitions from an active walk to a stationary observation of the surroundings. It begins by moving forward beneath a series of orange arched canopies, passing modern glass buildings and various kiosks while navigating through a flow of pedestrians. As the camera approaches a seating area, the motion shifts as it sits down on a concrete bench beside two resting NPCs. The scene then opens up as one companion departs, allowing the camera to pan across the passing crowd, including a man with distinctive green hair. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal a distant amusement park structure looming in the background of the covered walkway.
